articles.title: Amazon Prime Members Get 15 Games For Free In June And A New He-Man Adventure
articles.title_tr: Amazon Prime Members Get 15 Games For Free In June And A New He-Man Adventure
articles.summary:
A fresh batch of games for Amazon Luna has been revealed, and the main event in June is a brand-new Masters of the Universe adventure. Arriving just in time for the new feature film, Masters of the Universe: Legends Unite is exclusive to Amazon Luna, and it offers a couch co-op experience for players. Several iconic faces--and at least one skull--from MOTU are featured in the roster, including He-Man himself, Man-At-Arms, Evil-Lyn, and Skeletor.



As a reminder, all of the free games that you claim through Amazon Luna are yours to keep forever, even if your subscription expires. If you aren’t a member, you can sign up for Amazon Luna for as little as $15 for one month to take advantage of the subscription and its freebies. Luna members can also stream the challenging metroidvania Hollow Knight: Voidheart Edition, experience some old-school Capcom action in Mega Man 11, and have a blast in the ultraviolent retro-FPS Ultrakill.



If you're looking to download and keep games, the selection in June is also pretty great. Right now, you can grab a trio of remastered Tomb Raider adventures, the Definitive Edition of Mafia 3, and XCOM: Chimera Squad is a fun spin-off of the tactical franchise. Next week sees GI Joe: Wrath of Cobra bring old-school action to your PC, and Paradise Killer is an incredible mystery game.



June 18 adds some escape rooms to the mix, and rounding out the selection on June 25 are four more games, including the turn-based strategy title Terraforming Mars. That makes for 15 downloadable games in total that you can claim for your PC library, for free.




Sign up for Amazon Prime




Amazon Luna Free Games For June 2026



June 2




Tomb Raider 4-6 Remastered (Epic Games Store)



Mafia 3: Definitive Edition (GOG Code)



XCOM: Chimera Squad (GOG Code)




June 11




Tested on Humans: Escape Room (GOG Code)



Sin Slayers: Reign of the 8th (GOG Code)



GI Joe: Wrath of Cobra (Epic Games Store)



Paradise Killer (GOG Code)




June 18




Between Time: Escape Room (GOG Code)



Sugardew Island (GOG Code)



Wargame Construction Set 3: Age of Rifles 1846-1905 (GOG Code)



Space Grunts 2 (GOG Code)




June 25




Space Grunts: Chrono Shard (Epic Games Store)



Please Touch the Artwork (Legacy games code)



Terraforming Mars (Amazon Games App)



Lost Eidolons: Veil of the Witch (Amazon Games App)




Prime subscribers will also be able to play the following new games in May via the Luna channel:




Masters of the Universe: Legends Unite



Mega Man 11



Hollow Knight: Voidheart Edition




Don’t forget, several other subscription services also offer a solid selection of games at a low monthly price. On PC, this month’s Humble Choice selection is headlined by Octopath Traveler 2, Indika, and Life is Strange: Double Exposure. 



On the console side, PS Plus subscribers can claim Grounded Fully Yoked Edition, Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2, and Warhammer 40,000: Darktide 2, while the Xbox Game Pass library is expanding with several more releases this month.


		
			Check Out More Deals And Preorders
							
												
								Where To Preorder Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4							
														
								The New Lego Sets Dropping in June Include a Ton of New Disney, Marvel, and Bluey Sets, and So Much More							
														
								New K-Pop Demon Hunters, Marvel, DC, And Star Wars Hot Toys Figures Are Up For Preorder							
														
								Preorders Are Live For Magic: The Gathering’s Reality Fracture Event							
														
								Magic: The Gathering’s Hobbit Is Now Available to Preorder							
											
									
						Show More
						Check Out More Deals And Preorders Links (2)

articles.title: Mina The Hollower Is Selling Much Faster Than Shovel Knight
articles.title_tr: Mina The Hollower Is Selling Much Faster Than Shovel Knight
articles.summary:
Mina The Hollower sold 300,000 copies in its first three days, developer Yacht Club Games has announced, far faster than the studio's previous game, Shovel Knight. 



The sales figure comes from Bloomberg, who spoke with Yacht Club Games co-founder Sean Velasco. He said the strong sales so far mean the studio can continue operating as normal without making cuts or seeking outside investment. Yacht Club underwent layoffs and put a second project, a 3D Shovel Knight game, on hold over the course of Mina's development.


	
		
	
		


Velasco previously said Mina was a "make or break" moment for Yacht Club after working on the game for six years, and that if it sold 200,000 copies, "that would be really, really great."



Mina is selling far faster than Shovel Knight, which took around a week to sell 75,000 copies, according to Bloomberg. The stronger start is likely due in part to rave reviews, with Mina the Hollower currently tied with Forza Horizon 6 as the best-reviewed game of 2026 so far according to Metacritic. In GameSpot's Mina the Hollower review, writer Steve Watts gave Yacht Club's latest a 9/10, calling it a "masterpiece."



Despite the strong start, Velasco said he is hoping Mina reaches even higher sales heights. He previously told Bloomberg if the game doesn't sell a million copies he'd be "disappointed," and has now said he wonders how the best-reviewed game of 2026 isn't the fastest-selling game and cited a need to "close that gap."



Mina the Hollower was originally slated to release in October 2025, until it was delayed indefinitely at the last minute, a delay that ended up being over six months. In an interview with GameSpot, Yacht Club's David D'Angelo said the delay was to address the worst rooms in the Zelda-inspired adventure that needed more polish. It was also to make sure the game was balanced regardless of which route or items players were bringing to the game's various encounters. 



"It was a lot of permutations of just ways to play the game that we were just going through over and over and over and trying to make sure no matter how you played the game, hopefully you'd have a good time," D'Angelo said. 



For more on Mina, be sure to check out how the game was inspired by Pokemon and Final Fantasy Adventure, and for tips, consult our Mina the Hollower Guides Hub.

articles.title: 8 ülkenin dışişleri bakanlarından Mescid-i Aksa baskınlarına kınama
articles.title_tr: 8 ülkenin dışişleri bakanlarından Mescid-i Aksa baskınlarına kınama
articles.summary: Türkiye, Birleşik Arap Emirlikleri, Endonezya, Katar, Mısır, Pakistan, Suudi Arabistan ve Ürdün'ün dışişleri bakanları, İsrailli yerleşimcilerin Mescid-i Aksa'ya yönelik baskınlarını ve kutsal mekanın tarihi-hukuki statüsünü değiştirmeye yönelik girişimleri kınayarak, İsrail'e ihlalleri derhal durdurma çağrısında bulundu.

articles.summary: Anthropic, yapay zeka modeli Mythos'a erişimi 15'ten fazla ülkede yaklaşık 150 yeni kuruluşa genişleteceğini açıkladı. Geçtiğimiz günlerde Milli İstihbarat Teşkilatı (MİT) ve Siber Suçlarla Mücadele ekiplerinin ortak operasyonuyla Denizli’de gözaltına alınan sitenin kurucusu ve yöneticisi Selçuk Yılmaz, emniyetteki işlemlerinin tamamlanmasının ardından adliyeye sevk edildi.
